title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Transformation Checkpoint
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
